name: Blue Ribbon Jerky
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Lean beef brisket, eye of round or flank steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim meat completely of fat and cut across grain into slices 1/8 inch thick.
2. To aid in slicing the meat thinly, freeze until ice crystals are formed.
3. In a small bowl, blend all ingredients except meat.
4. Dip each piece of meat into marinade, coating well. Place in a shallow dish.
5. Pour remaining marinade over top, cover, and refrigerate overnight.
6. Oven method: Preheat oven to lowest setting (preferably 110°F). Place several layers of paper towels on baking sheets. Arrange meat in single layer on prepared sheets and cover with additional toweling. Flatten meat with a rolling pin. Discard towels and set meat directly on oven racks. Let dry for 8 to 12 hours, depending on the temperature of the oven.
7. Dehydrator method: Arrange meat on trays in single layer and dehydrate for 10 to 12 hours, depending on thickness.
8. Store jerky in plastic bags or tightly covered containers in a cool, dry area.
